AT-ISSUE MEMO/ARBITRATION CONFERENCE STATEMENT
T WAS PUT ON THE RECORD. PARTIES AGREE MAINTAIN THE CURRENT CUSTODY AND VISITATION SCHEDULE AS SET FORTH IN THE JULY 31, 1996 STIPULATION.
NTH. BOTH PARTIES PERMANENTLY WAIVE SPOUSAL SUPPORT. EACH PARTY WILL PAY THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES. THE FORMER FAMILY RESIDENCE ON JUDAH STREET WILL
THE RESIDENCE TO RESPONDENT. THERE IS NO DISPUTED PERSONAL PROPERTY. WAIVERS AND RELEASES WERE AGREED TO AS PUT ON THE RECORD. CITIBANK WILL BE
FIRMED AND TESTIFIED TO THEIR UNDERSTANDING OF THE AGREEMENT AND AS TO THEIR WILLINGNESS TO ABIDE BY THE AGREEMENT. VOIR DIRE OVER SPOUSAL SUPPORT
